system.description:
The Valorsworn is a knight with a selfless heart, a courageous hand, and an unyielding will in the face of danger.

LEVEL 3

Inspirational Valor. You are immune to Fear; gain an aura with a reach of 4, allies in this area are as well. When you Interpose, the protected creature gains advantage on their next roll this encounter.

LEVEL 7

Exemplar of Courage. You can Interpose from 3 spaces away. When you Interpose for a Dying creature, grant them 1 additional action.

LEVEL 11

Balm for the Downcast. When using Lay on Hands, you may choose another creature within your aura to be healed the same amount.

LEVEL 15

No Greater Love. When you Interpose while Dying, you suffer 1 fewer Wounds and all allies in your Aura gain 1 Action.
